name: WD_PROGRESS_REMAIN_TIME
description: Remaining time display showing hours and minutes with large animated digits. Uses DigitAnim components for smooth number transitions. Includes 'hr' and 'min' unit labels. Shows time left in current operation.
visualForm: Large animated digit display: [H]H → 'hr' → [M]M → 'min' with smooth digit transitions
descriptionKo: 대형 애니메이션 숫자로 남은 시간(시/분)을 표시합니다. DigitAnim 컴포넌트로 시간 변경 시 부드러운 숫자 슬라이드 전환을 구현하며 hr과 min 단위 레이블을 포함합니다.
descriptionEn: Remaining time display showing hours and minutes with large animated digits. Uses DigitAnim components for smooth number transitions. Includes 'hr' and 'min' unit labels. Shows time left in current operation.
